heading: The overview of
BBA in Data Science and Analytics

content.value: at Teksversity blends business acumen with analytical intelligence. Students gain hands-on experience in data analysis, visualization, and interpretation using modern tools like Python, Power BI, and Tableau. The curriculum integrates business decision-making, data storytelling, and process automation. Graduates are equipped for roles such as Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Executive, Market Research Specialist, and Operations Analyst paving the way for future specialization in AI, MBA in Business Analytics, or global data certifications.

keyPoints: Apply statistical and predictive models to real-world datasets
Gain hands-on skills in Python, Power BI, and SQL

heading: Why BBA in Data Science and Analytics in

title: 13 Years of
Legacy

whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity means stepping into a future-focused learning environment where data meets strategy. Each module emphasizes practical exposure through live projects, simulations, and case-based learning on business analytics, big data, and visualization. Students explore cutting-edge tools like Python, R, Tableau, and machine learning frameworks to solve real business challenges.

description.firstDescription: Our mentorship model ensures every student develops analytical thinking, problem-solving, and decision-making skills essential for today’s data-driven enterprises. Learners gain a deep understanding of data cleaning, modeling, and predictive analytics while learning to communicate findings through clear visual narratives and reports.

description.secondDescription: With 100% placement assistance, mock interviews, and exclusive industry collaborations, Teksversity ensures that every graduate is job-ready and confident to deliver measurable value to organizations across industries.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

faq.question: What is the BBA in Data Science and Analytics course about?
faq.answer: It’s a three-year undergraduate program that blends business management with data analytics and machine learning. Students learn to analyze and visualize data to make data-driven business decisions.

faq.question: What subjects are taught in a BBA Data Science and Analytics program?
faq.answer: The course covers Python, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Machine Learning Basics, Data Visualization, Statistics, and Business Intelligence.

faq.question: What are the career opportunities after completing BBA in Data Science and Analytics?
faq.answer: Graduates can work as Data Analysts, Business Intelligence Executives, Market Research Specialists, Operations Analysts, or pursue higher education like MBA in Business Analytics or AI certifications.

faq.question: Is BBA in Data Science and Analytics a good career option?
faq.answer: Yes, it’s one of the fastest-growing fields worldwide. With increasing reliance on data for decision-making, skilled data professionals are in high demand across industries.

faq.question: What technical skills are required for BBA Data Science students?
faq.answer: Students should develop skills in Python programming, data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI), statistical analysis, and problem-solving with AI and ML concepts.

faq.question: Why should I choose Teksversity for the BBA in Data Science and Analytics?
faq.answer: Teksversity offers an industry-focused curriculum, live data projects, and mentorship from experienced data scientists to prepare students for real-world business analytics challenges.

faq.question: From which university will I receive my BBA in Data Science degree?
faq.answer: Students at Teksversity earn their degree from a UGC-recognized university partner, making it valid for employment and higher education worldwide.

faq.question: Does the program include live data projects and internships?
faq.answer: Yes, the program includes hands-on projects, hackathons, and internships where students work on real-world datasets using tools like Python, Power BI, and Tableau.

faq.question: What kind of placement support does Teksversity offer for this course?
faq.answer: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance, mock interviews, LinkedIn optimization, and corporate mentorship sessions with analytics professionals.

faq.question: Does Teksversity provide additional certifications along with the degree?
faq.answer: Yes, students receive guidance for certifications such as Microsoft Power BI, Tableau, and Google Data Analytics, enhancing their employability in data-driven roles.
